response.justification: Strong backend engineer with 20 years of experience and proven distributed-systems expertise, but lacks critical CTO requirements: production multi-agent AI systems experience (only 1.5 months exposure at current role), no demonstrated team scaling to 30+ people, minimal fintech domain knowledge, and no track record in regulated financial environments. Missing the executive leadership pedigree and AI/ML technical depth required for this specialized CTO role.
strengths: 20 years software engineering experience with proven microservices and scale (Dunnhumby: millions of requests/sec, Optilyz: millions of mails annually)
Deep technical breadth across backend, infrastructure, CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, and multiple languages
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) and demonstrated mentoring through workshops and courses
concerns: Only 1.5 months of production multi-agent AI system exposure; job requires deep, proven track record in production agentic workflows
No evidence of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or holding executive technical leadership roles; most roles are individual contributor or early staff level
Limited fintech domain expertise (one investment company) and no experience operating AI systems in regulated financial environments with compliance/audit requirements

key_factors.factor: Production multi-agent AI systems at scale
